hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then (grep -nP ': any\b|as any\b|<any>' "$f" | head -5) && echo '⚠ [hook] `any` type detected — strict mode forbids it' || true; fi

f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|css)$'; then if ! echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(styles|docs)/'; then (grep -nP '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b' "$f" | head -5) && echo '⚠ [hook] Hardcoded hex color — use CSS variable var(--xxx)' || true; fi; fi

f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then (grep -nP '[\x{4e00}-\x{9fff}]' "$f" | head -5) && echo '⚠ [hook] Chinese characters in code — use English only (rule 0)' || true; fi

f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then (grep -nP '^\s*//' "$f" | grep -vP '(eslint-disable|@ts-)' | head -5) && echo '⚠ [hook] Code comment detected — rule 7 forbids comments' || true; fi

f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then if echo "$f" | grep -qvE '(session-sync|ChatInput|messageStore)\.(ts|tsx)$'; then (grep -nP '\bpersistMessage\b|\bsaveMessage\b|\.put\(.*messages' "$f" | head -5) && echo '⚠ [hook] DB write to messages detected outside authorized files — see rules/message-persistence.md' || true; fi; fi
